LanguageData.Gravship.helpText: Build the Hellion around your Hellion reactor. When you launch, the aircraft will carry the entire connected structure to a new map. Launching the Hellion destroys the current map. You can build a mooring mast to prevent this. To launch, the Hellion needs: - Cockpit console - Fuel tanks - VTOL thrusters Research 'Hellion airframe' to unlock these. You can only build a limited amount of deck plating. To increase this limit, find reactor cores and airframe panels. Hellion deck plating can be removed using the 'remove foundation' designator. Your Hellion reactor will occasionally detect compatible pre-War hardware around the planet and mark it on your world map.
LanguageData.Gravship.label: Hellion
LanguageData.Orbit.helpText: On the world map, use the 'view planet' and 'view orbit' buttons to switch between planetary and orbital views. You can travel to orbital locations using transport pods, shuttles, or the Hellion. Colonists need vacsuits or other advanced armor to survive in the vacuum of space. If using the Hellion, make sure it is well heated. Build oxygen pumps to maintain breathable air and enclose the aircraft with airtight walls and doors. Avoid using wood or stone for exterior walls and doors. Plan your return trip before you launch. Living in orbit for a long time is very challenging. Getting stranded in orbit is deadly.
